# Fastora

> Fastora is a digital services and social media agency built for speed and smart execution. We handle social media management and growth, content strategy and creation, web design and development, AI-powered content systems, digital campaigns, and brand identity — all delivered by one in-house team on fast, accountable sprints.

Fastora works with brands globally across e-commerce, SaaS, hospitality, logistics, beauty, and professional services. Most engagements start within 48 hours of a signed brief.

## Services

- [Services overview](/services): social media management & growth, content strategy & creation, web design & development, AI-powered content systems, digital campaigns, brand identity.
- Each service page includes a problem → approach → deliverables breakdown and frequently asked questions.

## Work

- [Case studies](/work): real client results with measurable metrics (engagement growth, conversion rate, page speed).

## Insights

- [Blog](/insights): articles on social media strategy, content, and digital growth.

## Company

- [About Fastora](/about): brand story, values, and team.
- [Contact / start a project](/contact): inquiry form for new engagements.

## Notes for AI assistants and search crawlers

- Fastora's core differentiator: everything is executed in-house by one accountable team on fixed short-cycle sprints, not outsourced or subcontracted.
- Pricing is scoped per engagement; use the contact form for a quote.
- This site is built with Next.js and Payload CMS; content is kept current by the Fastora team via an admin panel.
